description: Style Notehighlander, which has always upheld its principles of comfort, elegance and class brings to you these black trousers for men with an Italian touch. These chinos truly add a facelift to your daily attire. Pair these with a light shirt or a tee and look your best.Product DetailsBlack trousers with a metal zipper and button fastening, two side pockets and two rear patch pockets with brand logo and loops at the waistband.Material and CareBlended fabricMachine wash at 40 degree celsiusWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm IronSize and FitSlim FitThe model (height 6' and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
